ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of looking through a telescope. It starts with both arms relaxed, transitions to one arm extended to steady the telescope, then to the other arm looking through the telescope, and ends with the arms returning to a relaxed position.  The robot's arm structure will be considered to make the movements realistic.  The lack of elbows means the arm extensions will be straight.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready to observe
left arm extends to hold the telescope steady
right arm comes up to peer through the eyepiece
both arms return to a relaxed, resting state
